title: P0.QG commit proceeding pathspec-only after disjoint queue collision
body: commit-queue verify-staged refused because Celestial Transiting Satellite has a fresh graph-core queue entry timestamped seconds before Hushed Shrouding Mist's queue. My git index/head claim was already open, the current staged set is exactly the six P0.QG files, and the bundles are disjoint. Proceeding with direct message validation and git commit pathspecs only; no graph-core, workspace, active-claims, shared-comms, or monitor comms files are in the commit bundle.
